title: linum austriacum subsp. euxinum
intro: Linum austriacum subsp. euxinum, also known as the Austrian flax, is a subspecies of the Linum austriacum plant, belonging to the flax family (Linaceae). It is a flowering plant with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant's seeds and flowers contain flavonoids, alkaloids, and other compounds with anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
